title: [FIRRTL] Nested MixedVec Fails to Parse
body:
The following legal FIRRTL is failing to parse:

```
FIRRTL version 0.3.0
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    input a: {0: {0: {bar: UInt<1>}}}
    output b: UInt<1>

    b <= a.0.0.bar
```

This produces:

```
Foo.fir:7:12: error: expected field name
    b <= a.0.0.bar
           ^
```

The problem is that the lexer is consuming `0.0` and thinking this is a float.
